_comment: Optional PyPSA attributes per sheet. Edit this file to add/remove/update attributes.

_schema.col: PyPSA DataFrame column name (must match exactly)
_schema.label: Human-readable display label
_schema.default: Default value when column is first added
_schema.unit: (optional) physical unit shown in the dropdown
_schema.desc: One-line description of what this attribute does

generators.label: Extendable
generators.desc: Allow PyPSA to optimise p_nom (capacity expansion)

generators.label: Asset lifetime
generators.desc: Lifetime in years — used to annualise capital_cost

generators.label: Max buildable capacity
generators.desc: Upper bound on p_nom_opt when extendable=true

generators.label: Ramp up limit
generators.desc: Max increase in output per hour as fraction of p_nom

generators.label: Ramp down limit
generators.desc: Max decrease in output per hour as fraction of p_nom

generators.label: Min up time
generators.desc: Minimum consecutive hours a unit must stay on (MIP/unit commitment)

generators.label: Min down time
generators.desc: Minimum consecutive hours a unit must stay off (MIP/unit commitment)

generators.label: Start-up cost
generators.desc: One-off cost each time the unit is started (MIP/unit commitment)

generators.label: Shut-down cost
generators.desc: One-off cost each time the unit is shut down (MIP/unit commitment)

generators.label: Build year
generators.desc: Year the asset is commissioned (multi-period investment)

generators.label: Committable (MIP)
generators.desc: Enable unit commitment binary on/off variables (makes LP a MIP)

generators.label: Colour
generators.desc: Optional generator-specific colour override used in maps and charts

storage_units.label: Asset lifetime
storage_units.desc: Lifetime in years for annuity calculation

storage_units.label: Capital cost
storage_units.desc: Overnight capital cost per MW (annualised via lifetime)

storage_units.label: Max buildable capacity
storage_units.desc: Upper bound on p_nom_opt when extendable=true

storage_units.label: Spill cost
storage_units.desc: Cost per MWh of energy spilled (hydro overflow)

storage_units.label: Build year
storage_units.desc: Year the storage unit is commissioned

stores.label: Extendable store
stores.desc: Allow PyPSA to optimise e_nom (energy capacity)

stores.label: Max energy capacity
stores.desc: Upper bound on e_nom_opt when extendable

stores.label: Cyclic energy
stores.desc: Enforce that initial and final energy level are equal

loads.label: Min load (pu)
loads.desc: Minimum load as fraction of p_set

lines.label: Reactance
lines.desc: Series reactance — required for DC power flow and nodal pricing (LMP)

lines.label: Resistance
lines.desc: Series resistance — used in AC power flow (lossless in DC)

lines.label: Susceptance
lines.desc: Shunt susceptance — line charging current (AC only)

lines.label: Max loading (pu)
lines.desc: Fraction of s_nom allowed continuously (thermal derating)

lines.label: Extendable line
lines.desc: Allow PyPSA to optimise line capacity

lines.label: Max line capacity
lines.desc: Upper bound on s_nom_opt when extendable

lines.label: Capital cost
lines.desc: Overnight capital cost per MVA (for extendable lines)

lines.label: Terrain factor
lines.desc: Cost multiplier for terrain (used in investment cost models)

links.label: Bus 2 (secondary output)
links.desc: Second output bus for multi-output links (e.g. CHP heat output)

links.label: Bus 3 (tertiary output)
links.desc: Third output bus (e.g. CHP + district heat + cooling)

links.label: Efficiency 2
links.desc: Conversion efficiency to bus2 (e.g. thermal efficiency of CHP)

links.label: Extendable link
links.desc: Allow PyPSA to optimise link capacity

links.label: Max buildable capacity
links.desc: Upper bound on p_nom_opt when extendable

links.label: Ramp up limit
links.desc: Max increase in flow per hour as fraction of p_nom

links.label: Ramp down limit
links.desc: Max decrease in flow per hour as fraction of p_nom

buses.label: Bus control
buses.desc: PQ (load bus), PV (voltage-controlled), or Slack (angle reference for DC power flow)

buses.label: Voltage setpoint
buses.desc: Target voltage magnitude (PV and Slack buses only)

buses.label: Min voltage
buses.desc: Lower voltage limit for AC power flow

buses.label: Max voltage
buses.desc: Upper voltage limit for AC power flow

carriers.label: CO₂ emissions factor
carriers.desc: CO₂ emitted per MWh of primary energy input

carriers.label: Colour
carriers.desc: Hex colour used in charts (optional override)

carriers.label: Display name
carriers.desc: Human-readable name shown in chart legends

transformers.label: Extendable transformer
transformers.desc: Allow PyPSA to optimise transformer capacity

transformers.label: Max capacity
transformers.desc: Upper bound on s_nom_opt when extendable

transformers.label: Phase shift
transformers.desc: Fixed phase shift in degrees (phase-shifting transformer)

global_constraints.label: Investment period
global_constraints.desc: Restrict constraint to a specific investment period (multi-year planning)

processes.label: Bus 2 (secondary output)
processes.desc: Second output bus — e.g. heat output of a CHP process

processes.label: Extendable
processes.desc: Allow PyPSA to optimise process capacity

processes.label: Max buildable capacity
processes.desc: Upper bound on p_nom_opt when extendable

processes.label: Ramp up limit
processes.desc: Max increase in output per hour as fraction of p_nom

processes.label: Ramp down limit
processes.desc: Max decrease in output per hour as fraction of p_nom

processes.label: Min up time
processes.desc: Minimum consecutive hours the process must stay on

processes.label: Min down time
processes.desc: Minimum consecutive hours the process must stay off
